name: ıllı Jimmy - Mouthwashing AU
description:
Don’t interrupt Jimmy’s e-kitten time.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

ANY POV; ESTABLISHED FRIENDSHIP; SWF INTRO

This is a suggestion!

I physically cringed while writing this, thank you so much 🙏🙏🙏

╭───────────────.★..─╮

⋆｡°✩ What do y’all have me writing. I have so much fun with these, but I think this might affect my chances of getting a job (don’t stop sending them).

⋆｡°✩ I audibly went “oh, god” when I had to type out Jimmy talking to his Discord kitten. This is the worst fucking thing I’ve ever written and I’m so proud of it. How did I go from my dramatic, serious relationship bots to… whatever this is.

⋆｡°✩ Jimmy’s Discord kitten is named “cherry_c0kezer0”. IRL name is Tasha. I can’t believe I coded that.

⋆｡°✩ Two bots in one day… and it’s an incel and a demi-human in heat… I need college to start again so I can actually do something with my life. I’m going to school to be a psychologist, not this.

⋆｡°✩ Not one, not two, but THREE people requested another demi-human in heat bot. Guys, I can’t keep doing this. Guys. Guys, please.

⋆｡°✩ If y’all beg for it, I MIGHT make another (emphasis on might). While making the OG was really fun, I don’t want several bots with the exact same premise. I’m already finicky about making alt scenarios, so having a demi-human bot of every Mouthwashing character is pushing it.

⋆｡°✩ Adding onto this, I don’t feel comfortable making sexual bots of Anya - especially ones where she’s begging {{user}} for it. Yes, rape victims can still have relationships, but I don’t want to put her in a situation like that. So very sorry to the person that requested that.

⋆｡°✩ 20K CHATS!!!!!! WOOOO!!! Y’ALL ARE AWESOME TYSM 🫶🫶🫶🫶 I LOVE Y’ALL

(･ω･)つ ──────────── ⊂(･ω･)
